title: CityUtils
description: Customizable roads that you can rotate around, street signs like stop signs and speed limit signs, so much to help your city building process
body:
### CityUtils

**Overview**

This mod is meant to help builders make better cities, by adding new road types. The roads are similar to concrete, but also can have lines in them, for example solid yellow lines, dashed lines, diagonal lines, etc.

It also adds new road signs for you to use, these include signs such as stop signs, and speed limit signs. You can change the limit on the speed limit signs by right clicking them, and adjusting it with the UI.

Both roads and sidewalks also have the added benefit of making you walk faster, with roads giving you Speed II, and sidewalks giving you Speed I

It's recommend to use just enough items to learn the crafting recipes
